creator: mav@FreeBSD.org
text:
Realtek ALC888 codec doesn't have hardware loopback to record from
playback. Quite few HDA codecs can do this now, so this feature is not
even implemented in snd_hda driver. But even if it would be possile,
switching recording from mic to post-mix would cause echo to your Skype
peer, as Skype would also recorded what it just played.

-- 
Alexander Motin
